decisions.choice: claude fidelity palette (cream page, warm ink, terracotta single accent)
decisions.reason: the offer's punchline is 'open it in the AI you already use' — the UI must be the real UI

decisions.choice: WCAG 2.2 AA contrast; ink #3D3929 on cream #FAF9F5 (10.9:1)

decisions.default_applied: HAI word budget: shortest hello forms only (Hi · Ola · Hej · Ciao)
decisions.reason: one comfortable serif line; the footer chip carries @HumanitariansAI

decisions.choice: Pragmatist register: buyer framing (price, contents, rights, delivery), zero investor language
decisions.reason: this series sells workshops, custom courses, and $1 books from a nonprofit — it does not raise money
decisions.source: claude-explainer channels table; founder direction (this session)

decisions.choice: one callout per beat, accumulating; one idea per beat
decisions.reason: load limits; the callout is the signal, the spark line the summary

decisions.choice: handoff is a paste-ready ACTION toward the offer (find the course / audit the canon / draft the email / unpack the zip)
decisions.reason: each video ends one step closer to a purchase the viewer controls

decisions.choice: verdict artifact page carries a phase-gate line and (V1/V4) the 501(c)(3) mission line
decisions.default_applied: phase gate declared in-artifact; mission stated, not implied
decisions.reason: buyers should hear 'purchases fund the mission' before they ask

decisions.choice: offer facts stated exactly as spec'd: $1 Kindle/KU, free YouTube, voiced decks, quote via info@humanitarians.ai, zip = videos+exams+transform rights, any CLI, .imscc, white-label
decisions.default_applied: evidence law: internal product facts from the owner, no invented magnitudes
decisions.reason: the series' credibility is the offer stated plainly; every number and deliverable traces to the founder's spec or the site footer
decisions.source: Founder-provided AI+1 offering spec (this session): $1 Kindle canonical (free on Kindle Unlimited), all courses in video on the Humanitarians AI YouTube, voiced animated HTML slide decks on the site, custom versions quoted via info@humanitarians.ai, zip ships base videos + exams + transform rights, opens in any CLI, exports Canvas .imscc, custom training and white-label workshops. | humanitarians.ai footer: 'Humanitarians AI Incorporated — a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. State ID: 001846362 | EIN: 33-1984805'.
